codeReview.summary: Reviewed the fix handoff/transcript skeleton, both commits (`34fbba0c609e53664a7830e6984071d469f747c3` and `a93aea5e71a8272bac9624b70caab66395b5da9a`), and the current accounting code. The fix fully resolves the second prior blocker: `AccountingIdempotencyService` is gone and the touched payroll/settlement entry points no longer delegate through public `super.*` wrappers. But it does not fully resolve the first blocker: `AccountingCoreEngineCore` still retains full public journal implementations alongside `JournalEntryService`, so the monolith remains a live runtime owner of journal behavior instead of leaving `JournalEntryService` as the sole owner required by the prior scrutiny failure.

issues.description: The ownership hard-cut still is not complete. `AccountingCoreEngineCore` keeps full public journal implementations at `createStandardJournal` (317), `createManualJournal` (409), and `createJournalEntry` (548), while `JournalEntryService` still carries parallel journal owners at `JournalEntryService.java:153`, `632`, and `745`. Because multiple concrete services still extend `AccountingCoreEngineCore` (`AccountingService.java:61`, `DealerReceiptService.java:40`, `InventoryAccountingService.java:37`, `CreditDebitNoteService.java:38`, `SettlementService.java:68`, `PayrollAccountingService.java:54`), the monolith remains a live alternative owner for journal creation/manual-journal behavior instead of leaving `JournalEntryService` as the sole runtime owner. That means prior blocker #1 is only partially fixed even though the touched payroll/settlement methods and the `AccountingIdempotencyService` wrapper class were removed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The payroll/accounting ownership guidance is stale after this fix packet.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/hr/AGENTS.md:35,81` still says payroll posting goes through `AccountingCoreEngineCore.postPayrollRun()`, but the live path is `PayrollPostingService -> AccountingFacadeCore.postPayrollRun -> AccountingService.postPayrollRun -> PayrollAccountingService.postPayrollRun` (`AccountingFacadeCore.java:1707`, `AccountingService.java:204`, `PayrollAccountingService.java:120`). `erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/accounting/AGENTS.md:29` still describes `AccountingCoreEngineCore` as the centralized journal/payroll owner.

summary: FAIL: the fix removes the `AccountingIdempotencyService` shadow-wrapper chain, but it does not fully clear the prior ownership failure because `AccountingCoreEngineCore` still keeps duplicate public journal owners alongside `JournalEntryService`.
